_comment: This file is the canonical seed/fallback for the Google Sheet. It is NOT loaded at runtime — the live site fetches the Google Sheet defined in index.html. Use this file to (a) seed the Google Sheet on first setup, (b) verify required column headers, and (c) restore content if the sheet is ever lost.

_sheet_setup.share_setting: Anyone with the link can view
_sheet_setup.notes: List fields like 'features' and 'tags' must be separated with the pipe character | inside a single sheet cell. The 'featured' column accepts yes/no, true/false, 1/0.

Packages.name: The Intimate
Packages.features: Curated blanket & cushion setup|Styled table décor & centrepiece|Personalised signage|Floral arrangement|2-hour window · Setup included

Packages.name: The Gathering
Packages.desc: Effortless elegance for a small group
Packages.features: Full linen table & floor setup|Styled cushions & layered textiles|Abundant floral arrangement|Personalised signage & décor|Champagne or welcome drinks|3-hour window · Setup included

Packages.name: The Celebration
Packages.desc: A grand experience for the whole group
Packages.features: Grand linen table & full floor setup|Luxury cushions & styled throws|Floral installation centrepiece|Custom signage & personalisation|Full drinks & grazing spread|4-hour window · On-site host

Addons.name: Bouquet of Flowers
Addons.desc: Fresh, seasonal blooms beautifully wrapped and presented alongside your setup.

Addons.name: Floral Arrangement
Addons.desc: Bespoke fresh floral centrepieces designed for your table, tailored to your colour palette.

Addons.name: Painting for Two
Addons.desc: Canvas, easel, paint and brushes fully provided — a fun and romantic activity for couples.

Addons.name: Tan Canopy 10×10
Addons.desc: A stunning boho-style canopy providing shade, shelter and the most beautiful photo backdrop.
